props.name: logoAlt
props.description: Alt text for the logo image

props.name: items
props.description: Array of navigation items with label, href, and optional ariaLabel

props.name: activeHref
props.description: The href of the currently active navigation item

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the navigation container

props.name: baseColor
props.description: Base background color for the navigation

props.name: hoveredPillTextColor
props.description: Text color when hovering over pills

props.name: onMobileMenuClick
props.description: Callback function triggered when mobile menu button is clicked

props.name: initialLoadAnimation
props.description: Enable initial load animation for logo scale and nav items reveal
